shipped: AddScheduleRequest.input map wired from CLI grill-me through daemon to preset.input.* (R-V136P1-01)
Generic gate_evaluator (work_field | filesystem | previous_preset) with structured preset_gates_failed error per orchestration-engine.md §7.9.2 (R-V136P1-02)
novel_scaffold seed_chapters + patch_work wrapped in single DB transaction (R-V136P3-02)
--force-gates / --gate-reason CLI flags with append-only force_gates_audit table; ANSI-strip, 512-char cap, NFC normalize
Reserved input keys policy in add_schedule (work_id, creator_id, etc.)
gated presets without work_id return 422 preset_gates_failed (no silent bypass)
embedded-presets/novel-writing/preset.yaml gates moved under preset: with full §5.3.2 gate set
patch_work_tx returns Result<bool> (no dirty write on idempotent re-runs)
creator_schedules.work_id column + composite index; previous_preset gate uses equality not LIKE
R-V137P0-01 residual registered (serde strict-mode for misplaced YAML keys)
12 new integration/unit tests covering gate success + failure paths, force-gates audit, reason sanitization, scaffold atomicity
